StepAction: Gateway splice loop serving authenticated clients to per-user daemon at steady state
Condition: restart_self MCP tool invoked by AI

StepAction: Daemon route /api/v2/global/web/restart receives JWT-authenticated POST with targets and reason
resolveRestartRuntimeMode classifies runtime as gateway-daemon or legacy
Condition: isGatewayDaemon true and targets includes gateway
isGatewayDaemon true and targets excludes gateway
legacy mode dev-source dev-standalone or service

StepAction: Branch dispatched: gateway-target compileGatewayForSelfUpdate, daemon/frontend-target spawn webctl.sh restart --graceful with OPENCODE_RESTART_TXID, legacy spawn webctl.sh restart --graceful
webctl.sh do_restart fingerprints daemon source, frontend bundle, and gateway C binary against installed artifacts
Rebuild and install only dirty layers via do_build_binary, do_build_frontend, do_compile_gateway
Worker exits zero, route handler responds 200 with mode=controlled_restart and recoveryDeadlineMs=30000
Condition: targets included gateway and SelfUpdate.runActions succeeded

StepAction: Daemon path: setTimeout 300ms, then Daemon.removeDiscovery unlinks daemon.json daemon.pid daemon.sock and process.exit(0)
Gateway path: schedule restart-service opencode-gateway.service after 300ms, systemd respawns gateway binary causing 3-5s downtime for all users
Next authenticated request hits gateway find_or_create_daemon and detects stale daemon.json or missing socket
Self-heal escalation: read daemon.lock JSON, validate /proc/<pid> uid match, SIGTERM, 1s waitpid, SIGKILL, unlink socket path
Condition: orphan-cleanup result exited or killed logged

StepAction: Gateway re-creates /run/user/<uid>/opencode mode 0700, parses OPENCODE_BIN argv, fork+setsid+initgroups+setgid+setuid+execvp daemon
New daemon Server.listenUnix binds socket and writes daemon.json daemon.pid via Daemon.writeDiscovery
Gateway resumes splice proxy to fresh daemon, client SSE reconnect absorbs the 503 window, system back to steady state
Build failure path: route handler returns WEB_RESTART_FAILED with webctlExit, txid, errorLogPath, or RESTART_LOCK_BUSY 409 if stderr matches already in progress; previous daemon version keeps running
Condition: AI reads errorLogPath, fixes source, re-invokes restart_self
